generated.title: GeneratedBioconcentrationFactor
generated.description: This is an autogenerated partial class definition of 'BioconcentrationFactor'

description*.en: The bioconcentration factor is the ratio of the concentration of a chemical substance in biota over the concentration of the same chemical substance in water. It is related to the octanol-water partition coefficient.

title: BioconcentrationFactor
description: The bioconcentration factor is the ratio of the concentration of a chemical substance in biota over the concentration of the same chemical substance in water. It is related to the octanol-water partition coefficient.
